name: GV Service
message: GV SERVICE is a leading supplier and distributor of Italian-made cutting-edge technology for the ceramic tile, natural stone, brick, and advanced ceramics industries in North America. They provide all necessary machinery to establish new factory operations or expand existing capacities, along with high-quality materials, consumables, and spare parts. Their services include fine-tuned project management, logistics programs, and competitive pricing through bulk buying. Since 2000, GV SERVICE has been dedicated to distributing the latest Italian technologies in North America.
